description: Resume covers nearly all requirements - score should be high
resume: Senior backend engineer with 6 years of Python experience. Expert in FastAPI and Django. Built and scaled REST APIs on AWS (EC2, Lambda, RDS) serving 2M requests/day. Deep PostgreSQL experience including query optimization. Run Kubernetes clusters in production. Built CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions. BS Computer Science.
job_description: Hiring a backend engineer. Requirements: strong Python, FastAPI or Django, PostgreSQL, AWS, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines. 2+ years experience.

description: Our classic Jane Doe case - partial overlap, clear gaps
resume: Jane Doe. Software engineer with 3 years of experience building web apps in Python and JavaScript. Built a REST API used by 10,000 users. Familiar with PostgreSQL, Git, and Docker basics. BS in Computer Science.
job_description: We are hiring a backend engineer. Requirements: strong Python, experience with FastAPI or Django, PostgreSQL, AWS, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. 2+ years experience required.

description: Completely unrelated career - score should be very low

description: Tailored resume must NOT invent the missing skills

description: Tailoring should surface legitimately supported keywords
